subject: [GENERIC] Move deploy logs to different folder
commit_message:
[GENERIC] Move deploy logs to different folder

With new versions of helm, it seems that having logs in "onap" cached
subfolder prohibits `helm fetch`.
We move the log folder to its own folder.

Issue-ID: OOM-2414
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I470d7c4e9a2b939b1d4339349e90e9fb8739ae87

Patch Set 1:

Hi guys,
we've moved to helm 2.16.6 and we have this issue. 
I've seen other people having the same issue.
